feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)

entry.title: alligator wingtip, attaché case
entry.summary:
Author: cryptidjpg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,831Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: “You said you talked to Hen about”—Ravi makes a vague, conjuring gesture, even though Eddie can’t see it—“all this yesterday, right? She dresses the best out of all of us. You should ask her for fashion advice.” “I tried.” Eddie huffs. “She said, verbatim, ‘I’m not your gay Yoda.’” With that, the fitting room stall’s lock finally clicks open, the door swinging open with a muted groan. Eddie steps out, arms spread wide. “Alright. What do we think?” From an objective standpoint, he looks good. He looks really good. Objectively speaking. From a subjective standpoint, he looks like someone Buck wants to pin against the nearest surface and fuck until they’re both stupid. “Handsome, you are,” Buck croaks. — Or; Eddie comes out to Buck and takes him clothes shopping.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: You are my home
entry.summary:
Author: Enti13666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,237Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 21

Summary: When Christopher calls his grandparents after seeing his father with a copy of his mother, he was hoping for a few weeks of peace in El Paso. What he didn't expect was for his grandparents to sue his father for custody. When his father clearly doesn't want him and doesn't show up in court, Chris does the only thing he can. He calls his Buck. Buck has never let him down before.

entry.title: A fair-weather love affair / A slow burning, smouldering love
entry.summary:
Author: how_am_i_a_wh0re

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,064Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: A rewrite of what might've happened in s7 e6 after the bachelor party if the writers were sensical - a classic rewrite, so here's my take :) 'All Buck can register is Eddie’s neck displayed before him, glistening slightly in the fluorescent lighting, practically begging him to put his mouth to it. He knows he shouldn’t want to suck a bruise into the panel of skin there, so he settles for the next best thing. The hand not slung over Eddie’s shoulder comes up to his cheek, barely grazing the skin with the back of his fingertips, trailing down to his clavicle. Buck expects him to pull back - realise the implications and find another place to be, a place away from him. But he doesn’t.'

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Eyes Of Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiefan95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,818Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 19

Summary: Buck had always wanted a job where he could help people. After he leaves home he goes to visit his cousins Sam and Dean. He asks them if they can train him to be a hunter like them. Eventually he meets and becomes friends with a fellow hunter Eddie Diaz.

entry.title: do i look like him?
entry.summary:
Author: clintbartonswife

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,819Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 62

Summary: He knew what it meant; the shakes, the increased secrecy, the defensiveness. He was well and truly on his way down the path of addiction.Buck also knew that he should stop. He could ask for help. Talk to someone.But that would mean admitting he had failed.There's something inherently twisted to the fact that in this moment, clutching bottles of pills, he feels closer to Bobby than he has since the man's death.Some rotten part of him finds comfort in it. Addiction runs in families - if this is the only thing he has left of his pseudo-father, then who is Buck to deny it? Misplaced spite makes him tear the bottle open.It's not like Bobby is here to stop him.--or, after the events in New Mexico, Buck develops a drug addiction.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: My Life as Derek
entry.summary:
Author: nfarious

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,195Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: After surviving a traumatic kidnapping by Bonnie and Earl, who tried to force him into the role of their brain-dead son Derek, Evan "Buck" Buckley convinces himself the ordeal is behind him and skips therapy. On his way home from the station late at night, he is violently ambushed and abducted again—this time by an unseen captor wearing a grotesque Halloween mask. He awakens with a splitting headache inside an enormous, twisted adult-sized "nursery" painted in pastel blue, with giant block letters on the wall reading **DEREK’S NURSERY**. The room is a nightmarish blend of infantilizing comfort and dungeon-like control: oversized crib with steel bars, massive changing table with restraints, shelves of thick printed diapers, a playpen, and a huge rocking chair. Buck realizes his ordeal isn't over and that someone else wants him to be Derek. Question now is who and why?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death
  • Rape/Non-Con

entry.title: What Doesn’t Kill You, Makes You Want To Kill Yourself
entry.summary:
Author: marry_rites

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,808Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 44

Summary: Buck feels his chin wobble and his hands shake as he tries his level best to remember how many pills he took. He just can’t seem to figure it out. He has to. He has to. 'See you tomorrow, Buck.' It’s on the tip of his tongue. He can almost hear it in his head but the sound just won’t come out. The powder in his hands becomes sticky with sweat—seeping into his skin, into his veins, into his blood, into his head—he coughs feeling suffocated by the sound of his own silence. “Buck??” The concern in Eddie’s voice makes his chest tighten. “help” That’s all that he manages before he’s chocking on the words that won’t come out—that he can’t swallow back.   OR Emerging on the other end doesn't make you stronger like they say. Not every time. Sometimes it breaks you-chips away at you until you're downing and then its too late. Good for Buck, Eddie always finds him before its too late.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 150,484Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 93

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: Spring Cleaning
entry.summary:
Author: Sam_Stew

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,829Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: "What the hell is this?" Harry asks, setting the cardboard cutout of the ice skater in front of himself and Ravi, "who is it, why is it hidden in a storage closet?" "I thought you only borrowed that?" Eddie wonders, staring at the poster board. "I did," Buck answers, lifting his head out of the man's lap staring at the child cut out, "I probably should get a hold of her and see if she wants it back," he mutters, laying his head back down, "it has been a while, there's a chance she doesn't want it back," "Again who is this?" Harry demands, looking around, "cause if this is someone who still works here, we shouldn't have it hidden," he explains, turning to cut out towards himself again, "It should be on full display, this is something for sure," "That is Bobby," Hen explains. Or Harry and Ravi find something hidden in the station and get the story behind it

entry.title: Together
entry.summary:
Author: StedesParasol

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,275Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: Eddie took another shaky breath and adjusted his grip on the steering wheel eyes locked on the road in front of them. “I was ready to kill her Buck. I had a gun pointed to her head and I would’ve killed her if I had to. That’s-“ he let out a humorless laugh, “That’s the thing, too, is I don’t even feel guilty for it, not when it comes to you. Not when it’s your life on the line.” or   Eddie and Buck talk and cry.

entry.title: In House Secrets
entry.summary:
Author: JTFox

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,218Chapters: 5/15Kudos: 87

Summary: Buck is a triplet. Daniel is fraternal, while Ethan is identical to Buck. However, no one but the Buckley's knew this. His brothers weren't good people they would constantly hurt him when they were younger and only got worse over time. And while Buck doesn't have proof, he is almost certain both of his brothers have killed people. He hasn't had contact with either of them since he was 18 years old, but what happens when he wakes up from a coma to both of them in his room? What are his brothers planning? Will they get caught or will their plan go unnoticed?

entry.title: The pain stays but so does he
entry.summary:
Author: KeeperOfDragons

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,097Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: Chronic Pain was the one constant in Buck's life, and one of his biggest sources of shame. A secret that he wanted to keep hidden from everyone for as long as possible, but things don't always go to plan with the people you love. Or Eddie Diaz shows Buck that it's okay to be a bit broken.

entry.title: it's almost over, it's just begun
entry.summary:
Author: mmmikaela

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,677Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 86

Summary: Maddie widens the door to let Eddie inside and motions him towards the couch. She goes to grab her glass of wine from the table and asks, “Do you want anything to drink? Water? Something stronger?” Grimacing slightly, Eddie says, “No thanks, and sorry for interrupting your dinner.” Maddie waves him off as she takes a seat next to him. “It went in the microwave once, it can go in the microwave again.” She sets her glass down on the coffee table and grabs a pillow to hold on her lap as a place to rest her folded-together hands. “So what’s Buck done to get your eyebrows stuck like that?”Or, Eddie shows up on Maddie's doorstep after his dinner with Buck and Chris.

entry.title: Of Raccoons And Men
entry.summary:
Author: insidethevoid

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,728Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 131

Summary: “Check it out.”“Why me?!” Buck stares at Eddie, projecting indignance as much as he can through the darkness.“Big, strong men check out scary noises,” Eddie reasons, still only half-conscious. He wraps himself around Buck’s bicep and drops his head to Buck’s shoulder.“You’re just as big and strong as I am.”Eddie shakes his head. “Two inches and twenty pounds. You go, I need my beauty sleep,” he says, lying back down.The Buckley-Diaz family deal with a(n adorable) home intruder.

entry.title: some things stay
entry.summary:
Author: literalmetaphor

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,740Chapters: 9/15Kudos: 109

Summary: “You gotta be pretty desperate to take a job like this, especially with a kid.” “Why’s that?” Eddie’s face flickers through a dozen almost-expression, like hail against a window pane, never quite breaking through. Buck ticks the reason off on his fingers. “You got a ghost story looming over everything. No civilization for miles. The place is old and dark and, well, let’s be honest—creepy. The proprietor is an obvious drunk. That enough for you?” Eddie scoffs. “You forgot to mention the incredibly off-putting gardener.” Buck definitely does not smile. “That too.” Then, “So, I figure there’s something equally wrong with you.” -- A loose Bly Manor AU.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
